rationale: Type-only changes — Stryker mutation testing on type aliases is not meaningful (mutations of interface fields don't propagate to runtime). The equivalent signal is: (a) tsc --noEmit reports 0 errors after the doctor.ts import surgery, (b) L0.types-2/3/4 cover all 3 HealthResult discriminated-union shapes (3/3 = 1.00 coverage of the union's value space), (c) L0.types-5 runtime-checks the PluginSpec ↔ MARKETPLACES pairing (5/5 PLUGINS validate, 2/2 EXTRA_PLUGINS validate).
